problem: What neural connectivity differences cause autism spectrum characteristics?
hypothesis: Combining Neuroinflammation reduction via microglial targeting with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Longitudinal patient cohort with 25 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
